title: Bridge Essay: Electrophysiological correlates of long-term Soto Zen meditation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Electrophysiological correlates of long-term Soto Zen meditation.** — Biomed Res Int. PMID: 25632397. DOI: 10.1155/2015/598496. This study aimed to verify the electrophysiological correlates of the changes in long-term regular meditators. We use modern techniques of high-resolution electroencephalography applied to slow potentials, power spectra, and potencies related to the events. To obtain encephalographic records, we use an assembly of 128 channels in 31 subjects (17 Soto Zen Buddhist meditators).
